pi_items.verified_value: Simulated NREL WIND Toolkit data (8760 hours)
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh generates synthetic wind data using a random distribution script that explicitly produces 8760 data points.
The site_specifications.txt generated by setup_task.sh defines the site as Tehachapi Site Alpha.
The site_specifications.txt generated by setup_task.sh defines the parcel ID as 314-159-22.
The site_specifications.txt generated by setup_task.sh defines the coordinates as 35.1025.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates entirely on synthetic data. A deterministic Python script in setup_task.sh generates exactly 8760 hourly data points, producing a ground truth of 6.3 for average wind speed, 31.0 for maximum wind speed, and 70.4 for operational fraction. The remaining metadata claims (expected_output_path, site_name, parcel_id, coordinates) correctly align with the values injected into the environment by setup_task.sh and evaluated by the verifier.
